object_probe_bundle.goal: test whether family basis and concept offsets map to region-parameterized cortical patterns

attribute_probe_bundle.goal: test whether attribute axes map to local cortical gradients

relation_probe_bundle.goal: test whether bridge-role lifts map to cross-area coordination patterns

stress_probe_bundle.goal: test whether novelty and retention stress map to plasticity-vs-stability signatures

why_this_order.core_answer: The bundle starts from the strongest solved substrate and then climbs toward the still-open dynamic probes.
why_this_order.open_bottleneck_reference: shared object manifold to discriminative geometry compatibility

readiness.brain_execution_gap: protocol-ready but not yet causally executed

verdict.core_answer: P4 can now move from abstract probe design to an ordered execution bundle.
verdict.next_engineering_target: start brain-side execution from object and attribute probes before escalating to relation and stress probes
